creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Hi Frederic,

> Could you please update your submission so that these warnings are
> corrected? Also, it would be preferable to send updates in diff format
> instead of shar.

thank your for taking care of all of this. I should have found
the missing dependencies for myself :-(

I'll try to better take care of this in future submissions.
A new patch is attached to this e-mail.


- Frank
